name: Go1
description: Go1 is a learning content aggregator and training platform used for compliance training, L&D, and security awareness. Connect Go1 to verify employee access and training enrollment status.

config.setupInstructions: Create a Developer App in Go1 Developer Portal (https://developers.go1.com). Copy the Client ID and Client Secret. Ensure the app has user.read, enrollment.read, and lo.read scopes enabled.

checks.name: Go1 Employee Access
checks.description: Verifies that employees have active accounts in Go1 for security training access.

checks.name: Go1 Training Enrollment Verification
checks.description: Verifies that training enrollments exist in Go1, confirming employees are assigned and completing required training content.
